name: feature-bento
title: Feature Bento
description: An asymmetric Payload bento grid that leads with a featured cell and fills supporting cells.

preview.summary: Asymmetric bento grid with a featured lead cell and supporting cells.

sampleContent.title: One platform, every surface.
sampleContent.description: Lead with the headline capability, then let the supporting cells fill in around it.

items.title: Hosted dashboards
items.description: Composable charts on live data, embedded in your product with one snippet — the workspace your customers open every day.

items.title: Scheduled reports
items.description: Weekly digests rendered to PDF and delivered to every customer workspace.

items.title: Usage alerts
items.description: Threshold alerts that page the right owner before customers notice.

items.title: Audit log
items.description: Every change is versioned, attributed, and reversible.
